howItWorks.intro: This age calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Age
rules.formula: Years = Current Year - Birth Year (adjusted for month/day)

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: From your birth date to today, counting complete years, months, and days.

faq.q: Why does age matter for calculators?
faq.a: Many health, financial, and legal calculations depend on exact age.
